data.content: Fixed vi.waitFor test compatibility: replaced 4 occurrences of vi.waitFor (unavailable in Bun Vitest) with a local polling waitFor helper. All 9 tests in terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts now pass. The selected-agent label logic in terminal-manager.ts was already correct from prior work — the [agent: <label>] tag appears in both Claimed and TAKE log lines. This commit only fixes the test harness.
